title: The Curious Robot
description: Help Robi the Robot learn how to find patterns in the shapes around the house!

steps.content: Robi is a young robot who looks around the playroom but doesn't quite understand patterns yet. One day, Robi is trying to sort the toys but mixed up all the triangles and squares.

steps.question: If Robi sees a pattern like: Square, Triangle, Square, Triangle... What comes next?

steps.content: Robi beeped with joy! A computer looks for repeating patterns exactly like you just did. It uses this to make good guesses.

steps.instruction: Which of these is a machine finding a pattern?
options: Predicting the weather after seeing clouds

steps.content: Robi sorted all the toys correctly by using patterns. Thanks for teaching Robi!
